## Summary
Eliminates wasted Pass3 execution from Phase 2 missing-handoff recovery by introducing a narrow Phase 2 handoff-recovery runner.

## Changes
- Replaces `runPipeline(...)` use in Phase 2 handoff-recovery paths with explicit Pass1+Pass2 execution.
- Applies deterministic Pass2 lexical independence guard before handoff persistence.
- Preserves existing Phase 2 preconditions and handoff/queue behavior.
- Ensures recovery path does **not** invoke Pass3 / quality gate / WAVE.

## Why
Phase ownership must remain sequential at phase-gate level. Recovery logic in `phase_2` must only execute phase-owned work.

## Verification
- Type/lint diagnostics on `lib/evaluation/processor.ts`: clean.
- Existing targeted processor suite run captured baseline strict-gate expectation mismatches in test fixture setup.

## Ordering
This PR is **B** in the required sequence and should merge after PR A and before PR C.
